component_identification.content: Monster boards, custom six-sided dice, energy cube tokens, victory point tracker, Tokyo City/Bay spaces, and power card deck (keep/discard). Dice faces show 1/2/3 points, attack claws, healing hearts, and energy bolts.

core_game_loop.content: On your turn roll up to three times, keeping and rerolling any dice each roll Yahtzee-style. Resolve results: numbers score points sets, claws deal damage, hearts heal (outside Tokyo), and energy buys power cards. Monsters enter/leave Tokyo through combat pressure until someone reaches 20 points or last monster stands.

detailed_rules.content: If Tokyo is empty and you roll at least one claw, you must enter Tokyo and become King (and in 5-6 player games, possibly occupy Tokyo Bay too). Monsters in Tokyo cannot heal with hearts but gain points for entering and for starting their turn in Tokyo. Claws from outside Tokyo hit monsters in Tokyo; claws from Tokyo hit all monsters outside. When a monster in Tokyo takes damage, it may choose to yield after damage and the attacker takes Tokyo. Three-of-a-kind number dice score the number’s value, with extra matching dice adding +1 each. Energy cubes can buy face-up power cards: Keep cards remain until discarded/used; Discard cards resolve once. Elimination removes a monster immediately; turn order continues among survivors.

scoring_and_endgame.content: Win by reaching 20 victory points at any check point specified in rules or by being the last surviving monster. If simultaneous elimination/point triggers occur, resolve per official tie rules (generally active player priority and survival checks).

beginner_strategy.content: Early game, prioritize energy and card economy to build engine effects. Do not stay in Tokyo too long without defensive tools; tempo points are good but sudden focus fire is deadly. Reroll aggressively toward coherent outcomes rather than mixed weak symbols. Threat assess the leader—sometimes leaving Tokyo to a low-health opponent sets up a knockout. Keep track of explosive card combos at the market and buy denial when needed.

metadata.notes: Check 4 failed: total_token_count is 397; must be 800-3000 (hard reject if <800 or >5000)
